subject: Print jobs stuck; others cannot print to shared printer
description: Queue on print server shows error; restarting user's PC did not clear server-side jobs.

ts_steps.title: Local queue
ts_steps.action: On user PC open printer queue — cancel all documents; restart Print Spooler service locally.

ts_steps.title: Server queue (if permitted)
ts_steps.action: Clear stuck job on shared queue; restart spooler on print server during change window if policy allows.

ts_steps.title: Driver mismatch
ts_steps.action: Reinstall printer with correct universal driver; remove duplicate printers pointing to same share.

internal_information: Corrupt driver on server or bad PCL job. Print server team owns spooler restart in many orgs.
